subject: A dog-shaped elemental made of living flame, standing alert on rocky ground in profile
description: A medium-sized canine elemental composed entirely of fire stands in profile against a dark, smoke-choked background. Its body is rendered as twisting orange and yellow flame, with a defined snout, ears, and bushy tail all flickering as though caught mid-motion. The creature stands on dark, ashen ground with hot embers and small flames at its paws. The palette is dominated by reds, oranges, and yellows against deep black and charred brown, giving the piece a strong ember-against-night silhouette. Chandra herself is not depicted in the artwork; only her elemental companion appears.
foreground: fire-bodied dog standing on charred ground
background: smoky dark void with faint glowing embers
emotion: alert, eager, loyal — body tense and forward-leaning like a hound on point
